description_long: This object is a large, horizontally-oriented cylindrical storage tank mounted on a rectangular concrete or metal containment platform. The tank is constructed from metal, with visible welded seams and reinforced by two sturdy support legs. A metal access ladder is attached to one side, leading up to a circular hatch or manway on the top of the tank. On one end, there are several pipe attachments and a valve assembly, likely for filling, draining, or monitoring the tank's contents. The overall appearance suggests industrial use, with a utilitarian design and weathered, matte gray finish.
description: A large, horizontal metal storage tank with welded seams, support legs, an access ladder, and pipe attachments, set on a rectangular containment platform.
description_view_0: The tank is viewed from the end, showing the circular end cap, support legs, and the rectangular containment platform.
description_view_1: A side view reveals the full cylindrical body, welded seams, support legs, and the pipe/valve assembly on the right side.
description_view_2: The opposite end view highlights the circular end cap, support legs, and the pipe/valve assembly extending outward.
description_view_3: This side view displays the access ladder attached to the tank, the top hatch, and the full length of the containment platform.
